member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.SetCharacterHealthHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the SetCharacterHealthHelper for sending a SetCharacterHealth
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the SetCharacterHealth
to.
member.remarks: Sets character's health on the dead-to-alive scale: [0..1].
